channel.title: Chumocracy on LRG
channel.description: Recent content in Chumocracy on LRG

item.title: Tweet - 1141606631387607045
item.description:
If you live in Ely, you should see how local democracy works. When the local Tories don’t like the result, they call an extraordinary meeting and overturn it. #chumocracy I’m sure none of them would stand to gain personally…

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0
